reviewText: Absolutely magical experience! The Dal Lake houseboat stay was like living in a floating wooden palace. Our driver was incredibly polite and took us to beautiful hidden meadows in Pahalgam. Worth every single rupee!
Amazing hospitality! The VIP Gulmarg Gondola queue mitigation was a lifesaver. We bypassed the huge lines completely. Saffron tea from local sellers atop Phase 2 was unforgettable.
Our honeymoon was made extremely special by Sheenora. From local almond tea (Kahwa) on arrival to our lovely candlelit dinner overlooking Nigeen Lake, everything was tailored flawlessly.
Gurez Valley represents alpine J&K untouched by mainstream crowds. The wooden Dardic tribal homestay felt warmer than fine hotels. Habba Khatoon peak at dawn is a masterpiece.
Perfect Satvik culinary team and peaceful helicopters. Everything was handled with high devotional respect. Shankracharya Hill darshan was pristine.
Himalayan trekking at its best. Safe local guides, professional camping tents, and stunning turquoise twin alpine lakes! Will visit J&K again soon.
